case_title: LAHREN, THEODORE VS ZAMMITTI, KAREN C/O BAMBOO REEF ENTERPRISES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,002.91 FILED BY LAHREN, THEODORE AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMMITTI, KAREN  C/O BAMBOO REEF ENTERPRISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMMITTI, KAREN  C/O BAMBOO REEF ENTERPRISES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAHREN, THEODORE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZAMMITTI, KAREN  C/O BAMBOO REEF ENTERPRISES PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO POSSESSION OF THE PURCHASES WHICH HE PREVIOUSLY RETURNED TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
